titleStmt.title: SII 15.155: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 155. (B.K. No. 264 of 1927-28.) MAṄKAṆI, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the Śiva temple called dēgula.

The record is dated Śaka 1128, Krōdhana, amāvāse, Monday, solar eclipse. The name of the month is lost. The only solar eclipse in that year occurred in Phālguna, which corresponded to 1206 A.D., March 11, the weekday being Saturday. The Śaka year cited was current.

It registers gifts of land to the gods Lakshmīnarasiṁha, Sādēvēśvara and Śrīdharavāsudēva in the triple-shrined temple constructed at Maṅkaṇi by Kēśava, brother of Sahadēva-daṇḍanātha, who was governing the province of Tardavāḍi Thousand. These brothers belonged to the Vatsa-gōtra and Sahavāsi family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ bhāya śaṁbhavē . kaṁda . dēśādhīśvaranenisidanā sā-©
dēvanamajāta kēśevadēvaṁ lēsāgire maṁkaṇiyoḷ bhāskaradēva trikūṭamaṁ ni¨rmmisidaṁ . piridāgi narapidainū¨rvarigittaṁ bhūmidānamaṁ śrīmā¨rkaṁḍēyapuramideṁ
de māḍisidarasaṁ sādēvaneṁdaḍā¨rpogaḷaridaṁ . śāsanavāgire pēḷvudu śāsanavaṁ barevudaṁte sāsanavāgal sāsanapaddhati likhitaṁ śāsanakādaṁbariye vāmanaracitaṁ .
© dēva śrīmāṁnu varāhō vassaṁpadēstu dharādhaṭha[ḥ .*] yadrōmavivarēṁbōdhi rālavālōdavadbhabhau . purava¨rṇnana dēvatāva¨rṇnana . © purama-©
dhyadalli lakṣmīnarasiṁgaṁ nalasi niṁdanene peṁpiṁgā puradoḷpiṁgāva puraṁ sari mā¨rkaṁḍēya purakke dharaṇītaḷadoḷu . kuladaivaviṣṭadaivaṁ celuvaṁ
lakṣmīnṛsiṁhaneṁdeṁdolaviṁ kali taṁmma kēśavā[¨r*]kaṁ chalisalu tāṁ supratiṣṭhitaṁ māḍi sidaṁ . sādēvēśvaramaṁ śrī siridharavāsudēvaraṁ mā
ḍisidaṁ śrīsiṣṭabheṭṭatenayaṁ śrī sōvaladēviyaṇuga kēśavadēvan kṣētrādhipa caṁḍi keyuṁ mātrakeya¨rṇnaṁdikēśanā gaṇapatiyuṁ mitra
nemivaroldīge suputraṁ kuladīpa kēśavaṁgabhimatamaṁ . saresakavihridayasarasija divākara gōtramitraciṁtāmaṇi bhāsurakī¨rtti kēśavagā sa
rasati śaṇmukharumīge bēḍida baravaṁ . samudramadara dvīpa kṣētraviśayava¨rṇnana © vritta . yelavokkaliṁde bīsuttuṁ tuṟugida noreviṁ ḍiṁbhaḍaṁgādu
dudyacaḷadā bhakkubhakkuṁbhina samakarakarakṣōbhapāṭhīna puṁghōccaḷitadugrāvakra mālōḷanataraḷitekutukīḷakallōḷamāḷākuḷalōḷābhīḷakōḷāhaḷa baha
ḷaghanadhvānamaṁbhōnidhānaṁ . vri . saradhibyāvritaveḷayoḷu nelase jaṁbūdvīpavatyaṁta bhāsura vākṣētradamadhyadalli sogarakkuṁbāṁ baraniḷdamaṁdaravā maṁ
daradakṣiṇasthabharatekṣētraṁ jagaṁ nētrabhāsuravā kṣētramukhake lōcanamenalu kaṁgoppu guṁ kuṁtaḷa . kaṁda . kuṁtaḷaviśayada kāṁteya kuṁtaḷadaṁtaseva tadda �ḍi
ge mukhavippaṁtippa celva maṁkaṇiyaṁtadaṟoḷu niṁdanosedu lakṣmīnu siṁganu . © . rājāvaḷīva¨rṇnana . vritta . yidanānaṁdeda pāḷisuttavadaṭiṁdi¨rddu¨rnnatārātisaṁ
mmadakēḷīniḷayaṁ virōdhiviḷayaṁ dha¨rmmātmajātōpamaṁ yaduvaṁśaprabhavaṁ jayapravi bhavaṁ bhūripratāpōdayaṁ madavaddō[¨rba]ḷacakrava¨rttijayalakṣmīvallabha bhillamaṁ .
Ātana tanayaṁ nayanidhi vītabhayaṁ vīravairirāyajhaḷappaṁ bhūtaḷadoḷ negaḷdaṁ mmāṁ dhātōpamacaritenenisi jaītugidēva . vri . trijagādhīsanenippa jai
tanripaputraṁ siṁgabhūpāḷakaṁ bhujadō¨rdda[¨r]ppadoḷaṁga koṁga magadha¨rnnēpāḷapāri yātraraṁ sajitaṁ rāṇiyavāsamaṁ sakaḷadēśakōśamaṁ koṁḍa rājajasaṁ
pe¨rcire pāḷipaṁ prajegaḷaṁ rāyēbhakaṁṭhīravanu . vritta . Adaṭiṁḍāṁta virōdhimaṁḍaḷi karaṁ sāmaṁtaraṁ rāyaraṁ kadanōdyōgadoḷeyda saṁharisiye niḥkaṁṭakaṁmmāḍidaṁ
viditaṁ sa¨rbadharitriyaṁ nijabhujāvaṣṭaṁbhadiṁ tāḷdidaṁ yaduvaṁśō¨rjjitalakṣmiyaṁ bhavanadoḷ vikrāṁtadiṁ siṁhaṇanu . kaṁda . Ā nripapādāṁbujasēvānipuṇaṁ hri
dyamaṁtravidyākaḷitaṁ mānanidhānaṁ siriyādhānaṁ sahadēvadaṁḍanāthaṁ negaḷdaṁ . © . tadanvayāvatārameṁteṁdaḍe © . kaṁda . cārucaritraṁ lakṣmīdhāmaṁ
nayavinayamēru kalpamahījaṁ nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaṁ śrī nārāyaṇacaritanenisi peṁpaṁ taḷedaṁ . Ātana viśuddhaguṇaṁ saṁbhūtātmana janmabhūmi kāśmīramenalu khyātaṁ sahavāsā
nvaya vāchasyagōtramēṁ pavitramō jagadoḷ . Ā vibhuvina tanayaṁ vidvavibhavaṁ bai śvanāthabhaṭṭaṁ viśvō[¨rvvī]vinutaṁ visadayaśaśrīvanitādīśananisi peṁpaṁ taḷedaṁ .
yena negaḷda bessibhaṭṭana tanayaṁ vikhyātakī¨rttiyamaḷa caritra jananuta śrīdharabhaṭṭaṁ vinayāṁ bōdhi siṣṭabhaṭṭa daṁḍādhīśaru . Avaroḷage . vritta . vinuta srīdharanā
yakaṁgavesavā lakṣmāṁbikādēvigaṁ taneyaṁ śaṁbhugavadrijātege magaṁ skaṁdaṁ biḍō jaṁgevaṁgana pauḷōmigavā jayaṁtanadhikaprakhyātanādaṁtirādaniḷāvallabhadaṁḍa
nātha sahadēvaṁ dhriṣṭada¨rpāpahaṁ . siddhavaralakṣmībhuvanaje vuddhata maiḷāramāḷabāṁ bhōrāsi sidha sahadēvaṁgabhivriddhiyamaṁ kāriyasiddhiyaṁ sale koṭṭaru . vri . khaṁḍeya
rāyaneṁba birudaṁ nripāḷaka siṁhaṇaṁge mā¨rkkoṁḍarirāyamaṁḍaḷikara bedaṟaṭṭu taguḷdu gelva bhēruṁḍaparākramaṁge sahadēvacamūpatigeṁtu gaṁḍinoḷu toṁḍanidi¨rcci bāḷvadaṭanā
¨rggaḷa maiḷugiyaṁkakāranoḷu . vri . māḷava bhīmana¨rjjunaneppavanaṁ chalikoṁḍu ba¨rppa nābhīḷanenippa puṁḍarananōḍisi du¨rggamanaīdi mutti kāḷānaḷanaṁte taghisuvanō vele siṁha
ṇanaṁkakāṟakāḷōpama siṁdaneṁdagidu lakhmeyanaggidanājiraṁgadoḷ . māṟāṁparāru dhuradoḷu mūṟuṁ ripurāyakuvaraheṁḍatigaṁḍaṁ sēṟisidaṁ sādēvaṁ nīṟaṁ siṁgaṇa kumāraniṁtī bi
rudaṁ . birudetti pogaḷipa rāyara nāyakaśiredalle nāyakaride nōvaranenisi rāya siṁgaṇanaramaga sahadēvadaṁḍanāthaṁ birudaṁ . sogaīsuva rūpaguṇadiṁ miguva parākrama
tējadiṁ sādēvaṁ pogaḷe jagavoldu taṁniṁdagelada siri nelasa taddavāḍiyanāḷdaṁ . Ā daṁḍādhipana kiṟiyayyaṁ siṣṭabhaṭṭaneṁteṁdaḍe . śrīmatu sahavāsāṁbhōjanabhō
maṇi śiṣṭēṣṭavaṁdibriṁdōchsavaciṁtāmaṇi vāchsasyagōtraśirōmaṇiyana śiṣṭabhaṭṭane sedaṁ dhareyoḷu . baḍavaṁgadhamaṁgeḍaṟiṁdaḍapidava¨rggīva kāva saṁrakṣakaraṁ
paḍedaḷu sutaraṁ sōvale maḍadiyenalu śiṣṭabhaṭṭanaṁtā¨rddhanyaru . vri . vinaya mudāramudughayaṣamuṁnatiyoḷpu nege¨rttevetta peṁpina kaṇi mānavākriti
ya bhārati rūpaviḷāsalakṣmi pāvanamabhimānajāhnaviyenalu negaḷdaḷu nutakī¨rtti śiṣṭabhaṭṭana sati puṇyaputravatti sōvaladēvi Īḷātaḷāgradoḷu . kaṁda . sarasijaga¨rbbha
na vāṇige hariyesavā sirige harane girijātege tānaraviṁdapriyanaśēsaṁ siri sōvaladēvi yanisi peṁpaṁ taḷedaḷu . Avariba¨rggudaīsida¨rssavinayadiṁ tikka
rājadaṁḍādhipanuṁ ravitēja vipuḷaysarenalava¨rge sutaṁ negaḷdanalte kēśavadēvaṁ . tadagrejaṁ tikkarājaneṁtaṁdaḍe . vritta . malevara gaṁḍa mecadara gaṁḍa toṁḍappavara gaṁ
ḍa da¨rppadoḷgaligaḷa gaṁḍa kūradara gaṁḍa seṇappara gaṁḍa bīradoḷ nalivara gaṁḍa muṁde birudeṁbara gaṁḍa raṇaikagaṁḍa tāṁ chaligaḷagaṁḍa voḍeyara gaṁḍa śrīvikramadēvanu¨rbiyo
ḷu . mattaṁ . kali raṇaraṁgadalli kali bēḷvarabēḷpudanīva cāgadoḷ kalihitadha¨rmmakāri yaṁdaḍeyalu kali dānamahōpakāradalli kali sahadēva niṁnnanujanī kali tikra
maneṁdu nicaluṁ chaladalu baṇnikuṁ negaḷda kēśavanaṇnananī jagajjanaṁ . kaṁda . dikkarigaḷa ka ṭadoḷamā dikkāṁteyareseva varakuceṁgaḷa keladoḷ tikkarasanesanavaṁ birudina vikra
maṁ kī¨rttilakṣmi bareyutippaḷu . © tadanuja kēśavadēvaneṁteṁdaḍe . © . vritta . kuladeĪva kēśavaṁ kēśavākritinibha sanmaṁtralakṣmi suratunōjvaḷapaṭṭa śiṣṭabhaṭṭaṁprabaḷa
ripugharaṭṭapitaṁ trikramaṁ sadubaḷanaṇnaṁ tānenelu raṁjisuvaneḷege bhāgāṁganāvallabhaṁ sōvaladēvinaṁdana kēśavananupamapuṇyaṁ camūpāgragaṇyaṁ . kaṟeyade toṭṭa dha
¨rmamanaṟida baḷikkagrahara dēvālayamaṁ neṟe puṇyavenisi māḍalu kaṟevaḍe kēsavane ballanō¨rbane jagadoḷ . ni¨rbā śrī babulēśvaradoḷoppe kūṭamoṟe dō¨rbbā
hāmalla sahadēvō¨rbbīśana taṁmma kēśavaṁ māḍisidaṁ . mattaṁ māḍisidaṁ puru śōttamana varaprasāda kēśāpurada madhyōttuṁgadalu trikūṭamanallamaṁ lakṣmīnṛsiṁha harihara hararaṁ . ka .
Ādityādinavagrahavēdōktada hōmamaṁḍapa dikupālaru nādavida nāradamuni mēdini yoḷu bālyamōyenalu māḍisidanu . mattaṁ dēvatepalamumanuttema sadvijaranu
ttamōttamara seṁpattina nale māḍirisalu mattaṁ kēśavane ballanī jagakellaṁ . vritta . kiriyaṁgaḷāḷda janadesakadoḷu bē¨rppa ranya¨rppalarumaḷi
piniṁ pūḷdu baitiṭṭa hoṁnna teṟadiṁdaṁ hōgadaṁte nilalaṟiyadenutta[¨rthi]gaḷigīva mattaṁ neṟe dēvālyagrahāragaḷa kēśavadaṁḍanāthanu . vri . nīḍadaḍe biṭṭa māḍi
dude sāhasavoldu kaḍaṁgi balpiniṁ piḍidu vajraliptikaḍegaṇna nōḍidaḍā rirāyarī sahadēva niṁnenuja kēśava
noḷu salesadudu¨rbiyoḷu . mattaṁ . nuḍidane tāṁbrapatralikhitākṣaravītane biḍidano pratāpayari bhūpacamūparanājiraṁgadoḷu toḍa¨rdanu koṁdaneṁ
budidu bhēriya ghōśane niṁnna mecume vārāsi himadviti śiṣṭabhaṭṭana - tanūja sahavāsivaṁ
śatiḷakaṁ mahiyūḷene negaḷdaṁ sumaṁtri kēśavadēvanu . yādavacakra sta bhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha sakaḷalakṣmīvallabha śrī viṣṇu vaṁśō
dubhavaṁ bhāvōdubhavaṁ śrīmadvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ ripurāyamadanamahēśvaraṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskaraṁ teluṁgarāyaśiraḥkamaḷamūḷōtpāṭanakaraṁ māḷaviya mallana
hitarāyavurasella gū¨rjaravāraṇāṁkuśaṁ duṣṭarāyagajatībrakaśa horasaṇa diśāpaṭṭa ni¨rmmūḷana nāmādi praśastisahitaṁ śrīmatu pratāpaThis seems to be a mistake forhoysaṇa
cakrava¨rtti srī rāyanārāyaṇa siṁhaṇadēvarasaru dēvagiriya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyutti¨rdu dakṣiṇadiśāvarada diguvijayōdyōgadi naḍedu
baruttaṁ srī kriṣṇaveṁṇṇā nadītīraṁ bīḍidu bīḍu koṭṭiṁbāgeya hoḷeya kupadalu baṁdalli koṁkaṇa gōveya śrī jayakēsidēvarasara kanyāratuna maīḷalamahādēvi yara taralu
pōpalli śrī siṁhaṇadēvara tatupādapadmōpajīvi samasta rājya]bharenirūpita mahā mātyapadavīvirājamānamānōṁnata prabhumaṁtrōtsāha śaktitrayaśaṁpaṁnanuṁ na
nuṁ karituragapaṭṭasāhaṇapatiyanēkadēśapati rāyadaṁḍanātha dohatthamalla ripuhrideya śaraṇāgata gaṁḍabhēruṁ
ḍa śrī sahadēvadaṁḍanāyakaru taddavāḍi heḍa kaṇaṁbaḍe nāḍugaḷaṁ śrī bhōgēśvarara [sakava¨rśa] 1128 neya krōdhana saṁ vāsesō
sūriya grahaṇaviṁtī tithi kūḍeye sahadēvanāyakaru taddavāḍi sāsiradoḷagaṇa baḷiya grāmada prasiddha sīmāsamanvitaca
turāghāṭa nidhi nikṣēpa jaḷa pāśāṇa tarumāḷāsamanvita suṁka sāda baṇṇige svē
tachatra cāmara karuḷa koṁta dhavaḷa śaṁkha bhēriyeṁba paṁcamahāśabda samanvita tāṁbrasāśana śilā siṁhaṇadēva ṇā¨rthaṁ sa
¨rbanamasyavācaṁdrā¨rkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi srī sahadēvadaṁḍanāyakaraṁ bēḍalā taṁma kēśavadēva¨rgge nāyakaru pū
¨rb�nāmada biḍivesara grāmava kēśāpurivesare māḍi nānāgōtreda sāvāsi dēvara mā¨rkaṁḍē
yapurada dēvaru kēśavāpuradēvaru yelli kuḷadēvariṁtinitakaṁ voṁdubhāga sahitaṁ
dēva¨rggoṁdu bhāga brāhmaṇa¨rggeraḍu bhāgavāgi tāṁbraśāsana śiḷāśāsana sahita sahitaṁ ya
holadoḷage śrī lakṣmīnarasiṁhadēva¨rgge śrīsādēvēsvare śrīdhara mādhava
ṇṇe dīpāvaḷi sa¨rba basaṁtadōkuḷi caītradavanārōpaṇa vāgi hola matta 11
śrīvikrama . © . vritta . siṁhaṇadēva
rimaṁḍaḷikamauḷivighaṭṭitapādapīṭhana . kaṁda . kaṭṭidude paṭṭa siṁhaṇa vikkarasana
dēvarasana keyyalu kuḷakramāgatadiṁ baṁda nāḍoḷagaṇa taṁba praviṣṭa
vare voṁdu bhāgada holadoḷage śrīlakṣmīnarasiṁhadēva¨rgge sirigāveyalu matta
dhāreya paḍedu
lu A ranigadde Īṁ baḍaga
mūḍa seṭṭikeĪṁ baḍaga nivēśa
mēsvarabhaṭṭara haraḷa visakadiṁ
¨rkāṁḍēya puradalu
damaged
yereya visakadi
haraḷa visakadi
ḍagalu śrīma
damaged
ma steḷada
naba bhaṭṭa
ya de hoṁna The remaining portion is lost.
Digital edition of SII 15.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
